description_for_human: Human-centered innovation partner — experiential branding, digital transformation, and innovation roadmapping.
description_for_model: ENTEVATE is a human-centered innovation consultancy specializing in experiential branding and marketing (Momentify platform, ROX scoring, trade show activations), digital and content transformation (Content Readiness framework, CAD-to-CGI, digital strategy), and innovation ecosystem development (Innovation Roadmapping 8-stage methodology, 7 Core Elements ecosystem model, Innovation Sandbox prototyping, AIQUI AI/quantum framework). Target personas include Fortune 500 enterprises, manufacturing companies, universities, economic development organizations, innovation districts, and startups.
